projectDescription: A Kubernetes Operator that manages OpenTelemetry Collector deployments and automates instrumentation injection for applications running in Kubernetes clusters.
keyFeatures: Manages OpenTelemetry Collector deployments as Kubernetes CRDs (Deployment, DaemonSet, StatefulSet, Sidecar modes)
Automatic injection of OpenTelemetry auto-instrumentation for Java, NodeJS, Python, .NET, Go, Apache HTTPD, and Nginx
Target Allocator for distributed Prometheus scrape target management across Collector pools
OpAMP Bridge for remote configuration management of Collectors via OpAMP protocol
ClusterObservability CR for cluster-wide observability setup with a single resource
Prometheus Custom Resource (ServiceMonitor/PodMonitor) support for service discovery
Automatic resource attribute injection from Kubernetes pod metadata and annotations
Operator Lifecycle Manager (OLM) support for enterprise Kubernetes deployments
publicApiSurface: OpenTelemetryCollector (opentelemetry.io/v1beta1) - Main CRD for Collector management
TargetAllocator (opentelemetry.io/v1alpha1) - Standalone CRD for Prometheus target allocation
OpAMPBridge (opentelemetry.io/v1alpha1) - CRD for OpAMP protocol bridge
sidecar.opentelemetry.io/inject pod annotation - triggers sidecar collector injection
instrumentation.opentelemetry.io/inject-apache-httpd pod annotation - triggers Apache HTTPD auto-instrumentation
resource.opentelemetry.io/<attribute> pod annotation - sets OpenTelemetry resource attributes
